texto: Science is rooted in the will to truth. With the will to truth it stands or falls. Lower the standard even slightly and science becomes diseased at the core. Not only science, but man. The will to truth, pure and unadulterated, is among the essential conditions of his existence; if the standard is compromised he easily becomes a kind of tragic caricature of himself.
explicacao: Citação de Max Wertheimer sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Science is rooted in the will to truth. With the will to truth it stands or falls. Lower the stan…” articula reflexao, compromise, disease em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como disease e existence.
